title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 5 - 2017: 20 Area Dimension page still

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day on April 5, 2017 in Boulder, noting he got little sleep but felt fine. He worked on a chart he calls 'Area Dimension' showing race distances as circles with panoramic views, and got a new idea to add buildings at cardinal points as scale references. He also spent time listening to Wikipedia articles about the history of Rome and Titus Livius, feeling immersed in the historical narrative.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Surprised he isn't tired after two nights of only 4-5 hours of sleep
Excited and motivated despite it taking longer than expected; likes the page
Believes you can tap into the same mindset as historical figures when deeply engaged with their stories
Thinks they have gotten really good with lots of detail
